name: Corn-Meal Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg, melted shortening, milk, and corn-meal in a mixing bowl.
2. In another bowl, sift together white flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until smooth.
4. Pour the batter into a hot waffle iron.
5. Cook until golden brown and serve 4 servings.
Mrs. Anne Payson, Haswell, CO.
